entities.name: GAMBIA
entities.description: The country where the dietary assessment was conducted

entities.name: EAT-LANCET GUIDELINES
entities.description: Guidelines for healthy and sustainable diets used as a reference for assessment

entities.name: POPULATION HEALTH
entities.description: The overall health of the population

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEM RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of food systems to withstand and recover from shocks

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT
entities.description: The adverse effects of dietary patterns on the environment

entities.name: GAMBIAN INTEGRATED HOUSEHOLD SURVEY
entities.description: The dataset comprising food consumption data from 12,713 households

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AND HEALTHY DIET INDEX (SHDI)
entities.description: An index computed based on the deviation of food groups from EAT-Lancet recommendations

entities.name: MULTIVARIABLE MIXED EFFECTS REGRESSION
entities.description: The statistical method used to model socio-economic and geographic determinants of SHDI scores

entities.name: REFINED GRAINS
entities.description: Processed grains that were consumed in excess of recommendations

entities.name: WHOLEGRAINS
entities.description: Unprocessed grains suggested as a substitute for refined grains

entities.name: ADDED SUGARS
entities.description: Sweeteners consumed in excess of recommendations

entities.name: FRUITS
entities.description: Nutritionally important food group with low adherence to recommendations

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Nutritionally important food group with low adherence to recommendations

entities.name: NUTS
entities.description: Nutritionally important food group with low adherence to recommendations

entities.name: DAIRY
entities.description: Nutritionally important food group with low adherence to recommendations

entities.name: POULTRY
entities.description: Nutritionally important food group with low adherence to recommendations

entities.name: BEEF AND LAMB
entities.description: Nutritionally important food group with low adherence to recommendations

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC DETERMINANTS
entities.description: Factors such as household head gender, size, education, and wealth index

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC DETERMINANTS
entities.description: Factors such as urban or rural settlement

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period associated with increased adherence to dietary targets

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of crops produced by households, associated with increased adherence
